creator: linpct@gmail.com
text:
Hi, I found that 10 days ago there is a v1.2.3 update:

https://github.com/phalcon/cphalcon/releases

So, please help me make makesum again and commit, Thanks.

SHA256 (phalcon-v1.2.3.tar.gz) =
e8630c78416264b99af9d5205d1840d1a4383c4416c6e4cc887987f8466b7afc
SIZE (phalcon-v1.2.3.tar.gz) = 2573572


2013/8/26 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>

> Maintainer of www/phalcon,
>
> Please note that PR ports/181556 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/181556
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>



-- 
Daniel Lin (pct)
